title: cytisanthus horridus
intro: Cytisanthus horridus, also known as the rough-seeded kidney bean or rough-seeded cytisanthus, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Cytisanthus horridus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, gout, and other urinary tract issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
